'''Neas Nyl''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] male and the son of [[Darca Nyl|Darca]] and [[Teril Nyl]].

==Biography==
When a ship on a mission to return the deadly murderer [[Lycan]] to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] crashed on their lands, his father went to investigate the shipwreck and ordered Neas to wait in the house. Lycan found his way to their house when Darca Nyl was still at the crash site and mercilessly killed Neas. His death sparked a feeling of vengeance in his father who avenged his son's death by pursuing and killing Lycan.
